_schema.description: Per-model override table. Sparse. only add entries for models the router doesn't route correctly by itself. Each key is a HuggingFace repo id.

fields.adapter: optional string. force a specific adapter by name. Valid: 'standard', 'diffusers', or any folder name under python/models/ (e.g. 'florence2', 'janus', 'qwen_vl', 'llava', 'moondream', 'fastvlm', 'detr', 'sam', etc.)
fields.trust_remote_code: optional bool. pass to HF loaders for repos that ship custom modeling files
fields.params: optional object. default params merged before request params (e.g. {max_new_tokens: 512})

microsoft/Florence-2-large.notes: Default task token; change florence_task per call for <OD>, <DETAILED_CAPTION>, etc.

stepfun-ai/GOT-OCR2_0.notes: Original repo declares model_type 'GOT' (not 'got_ocr2') and ships custom modeling code.
